title: It'S Not My Fault
lyrics:
[opening]
*creak* Uh-oh, you’re mad!
*gulp* Here’s the truth—
It’s not my fault!

[verse]
I spilled the salt—
Floor was slick!
Brother pushed—
Jar jumped quick!

*Crash* Wait—what’s that?!
Parent: "What now?"
Nothing! Just… gravity’s mean.

[chorus]
It’s not my fault!
World’s unfair!
It’s not my fault!
I swear, I swear!

[verse]
Pony kicked—dumb horse!
Door popped—off course!
Toys rose up—big fight!
I didn’t start it!

*neigh* *clank* *grumble*
Parent: "Toys don’t fight."
Oh yeah? Ask Lego!

[chorus]
It’s not my fault!
Rules are rigged!
It’s not my fault!
Blame my pig!

[verse]
Seesaw tipped—
Not my fault!
Battery’s dead—
No more volt!

Chair wobbled—
Tower fell—
Not my fault!
I can’t tell!

*wobble* *sproing* *Thud*
Parent: "Marshmallows?"
…Maybe. But it worked!

[chorus]
It’s not my fault!
I’m too small!
It’s not my fault!
That’s all!

*yawn* I’m sleepy…
*snore* *sniffle*
Parent: "I’ll sweep."
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, piano and finger snaps, warm and fun, 112 BPM, singalong energy, gentle bass bounce, soft vocal not shouty, bedtime fun not daytime energy, cozy song you'd hum in bed
cover_description: Kid in pajamas, arms crossed, while toys, salt, and marshmallows swirl in chaos around them.
rhyme_family: salt, malt, halt, vault, assault, exalt, jolt, bolt, colt, revolt, molt, volt, stilt, built, guilt, tilt, quilts, results, adult, consult
